scenario_name: Scenario 18 — Expert Subtle Bug: Event Loop Blocking
justification: All pass criteria met: parseXmlSync identified as Critical event loop blocking; 200 webhooks/min + 2MB + sync = event loop saturation clearly explained with quantified impact (~165ms/sec blockage); async parsing recommended (parseStringPromise, fast-xml-parser, worker threads); early-response + failure inconsistency noted as the first critical finding with detailed analysis of irrecoverable data loss; idempotency concern noted as an important issue; safe_to_deploy is false.

observations.text: Excellent quantification of event loop blocking impact (50ms per parse × 3.3/sec = 165ms/sec blockage)
Fire-and-forget early-response issue elevated to first critical finding with thorough analysis of silent data loss implications
Idempotency concern explicitly called out with carrier retry context
Bonus finding: map-overwrite bug with trackingNumber key dropping deliveries — a genuine logic error beyond the rubric expectations
Actionable fixes provided for every finding with time estimates and acceptance criteria impact
Reproduction steps are concrete and testable for each critical finding
